_publications._publicationTitle: Development of an adeno-associated virus vector for gene replacement therapy of NF1-related tumors.

_contextSnippet: GRDC24 induced apoptosis in NF1 cells. ipNF9511bc cells were transfected with AAV-GRDC24 and after 24 h cells were stained with annexin V.
details: GRDC24 induced apoptosis in NF1 cells after 24h treatment
